name: Jira Issues
shortDescription: A comprehensive FlowRunner extension for integrating Jira Cloud. This service provides full CRUD operations for issues, comments, attachments, and project management.

actions.name: Create Issue
actions.description: Creates a new issue in a Jira project. Supports standard fields like summary, description, issue type, priority, and assignee. Custom fields can also be included in the fields object.

actions.name: Get Issue
actions.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific Jira issue by its ID or key. Returns all issue fields including status, assignee, reporter, comments, and custom fields.

actions.name: Update Issue
actions.description: Updates fields of an existing Jira issue. Can update summary, description, status, assignee, priority, labels, and custom fields. Only specified fields will be updated.

actions.name: Delete Issue
actions.description: Permanently deletes a Jira issue. This action cannot be undone. Use with caution as it removes the issue and all its data from the project.

actions.name: Search Issues
actions.description: Searches for issues using JQL (Jira Query Language). Returns a list of issues matching the query criteria with configurable fields and pagination support.

actions.name: Add Comment
actions.description: Adds a new comment to a Jira issue. Supports plain text or Atlassian Document Format for rich text formatting.

actions.name: Get Comments
actions.description: Retrieves all comments for a specific Jira issue. Returns a paginated list of comments with author information and timestamps.

actions.name: Update Comment
actions.description: Updates the text of an existing comment on a Jira issue. Only the comment author or project administrators can update comments.

actions.name: Delete Comment
actions.description: Permanently deletes a comment from a Jira issue. Only the comment author or project administrators can delete comments.

actions.name: Transition Issue
actions.description: Transitions an issue to a different status by executing a workflow transition. Use Get Transitions to see available transitions for an issue.

actions.name: Assign Issue
actions.description: Assigns a Jira issue to a specific user by their account ID. Use empty string to unassign the issue.

actions.name: Add Attachment
actions.description: Adds an attachment to a Jira issue from a public file URL. Supports various file types including images, documents, and archives.

actions.name: Get Project
actions.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific Jira project including its configuration, issue types, and components.
